title: Tic-Tac-Toe NextGen
description: Play against our custom-built AI. Choose between Easy, Medium, or Hard (Minimax) difficulty.

title: AI Magic Canvas
description: A magical free-form drawing canvas. Pick your colors and use the AI Symmetry brush to create beautiful generative art!

title: Neural Racer X
description: An intense, AI-generated track racing game where the environment adapts to your driving style.

title: Quantum Chess
description: Play chess against a neural network that predicts your moves with quantum-like precision.

title: Synth City Builder
description: Build and manage a cyberpunk metropolis where the AI dynamically simulates citizen behavior.

title: Void Defender
description: Defend your base against waves of procedurally generated alien swarms that learn your tactics.

title: Echo Maze
description: Navigate through a labyrinth that shifts and changes based on AI voice recognition algorithms.

title: Neon Strike
description: Fast-paced arcade shooter with generative neon visuals and an adaptive synth-wave soundtrack.
